research.title: Memory systems comparison v1
research.summary: A vendor-comparison pre-registration retained as an inspectable withdrawal. It was never executed.

research.title: Memory systems control arm
research.summary: A control-arm pre-registration created before observation and withdrawn with the unauthorized vendor route.

research.title: Artifact coherence transfer study v1
research.summary: A prospective study invalidated before measurement after a protocol deviation and an independently identified detector defect.

research.title: Artifact delivery instrument v2
research.summary: A controlled instrument-validation study preregistered but blocked before probe entry because the required opposing review produced no verdict.

block.summary: Fresh no-cache prompt-eval release failed 14 of 14 must-pass cases; opposing review was not run, with no probe entry and no Evidence.

mechanisms.title: Canon envelope store
mechanisms.summary: Append-only, validator-gated records for Claims, Evidence, Decisions, Policies, and events.

mechanisms.title: Frozen promotion gates
mechanisms.summary: Evaluation thresholds are bound to Claims before observation and cannot be amended afterward.

mechanisms.title: Decision-backed publication guard
mechanisms.summary: The static build refuses result publication without a valid terminal Decision and intact canon lineage.

engineering_cases.title: The build refuses unsupported findings
engineering_cases.summary: Canon validation and publication guards run before every site build, rejecting results without a valid Decision-to-Evidence chain.
engineering_cases.label: engineering case study
engineering_cases.learned: Moving the epistemic rule into the build makes unsupported publication unavailable rather than merely discouraged.
engineering_cases.limits: The guard proves contract enforcement, not the truth of any future Evidence.

engineering_cases.title: One digest, two public readers
engineering_cases.summary: A deterministic projection is generated once, consumed by human pages and JSON clients, and deployed as an immutable Pages release.
engineering_cases.label: engineering case study
engineering_cases.learned: Binding both readers to one digest turns disagreement into measurable drift.
engineering_cases.limits: This is an implementation result, not evidence that the knowledge methodology produces true findings.

engineering_cases.title: Telemetry failure stays off the hot path
engineering_cases.summary: Primary telemetry append failure falls back to an ownership-checked spool while research execution continues.
engineering_cases.label: engineering case study
engineering_cases.learned: A receipt can preserve delivery degradation without turning optional observability into a system-wide stop condition.
engineering_cases.limits: Tests establish software behavior; they do not establish an empirical law about all telemetry systems.

engineering_cases.title: A failed review gate remains visible
engineering_cases.summary: The system preserved a launcher failure, repaired the execution boundary, then stopped when the real no-cache gate failed 14 of 14 cases.
engineering_cases.label: engineering case study
engineering_cases.learned: Separating launcher failure from model evaluation prevents infrastructure noise from becoming a scientific verdict.
engineering_cases.limits: This retrospective receipt is not a prospective denominator and produced zero Evidence.

conjectures.title: Leave-one-variable-out tests may falsify diagnostic system models
conjectures.source_mechanism: LOVO tests whether a learned causal structure predicts relationships involving a withheld variable; replicated systems expose explicit state and transition relationships.
conjectures.target_mechanism: Withholding one telemetry variable or dependency edge can test whether a proposed failure account predicts the missing relation.
disanalogies: Telemetry variables are selected, not naturally sampled
Distributed-system transitions may violate causal-discovery assumptions
competing_explanations: The withheld edge is redundant under the model
falsifiers: LOVO prediction performs no better than a topology-naive baseline across registered incidents
conjectures.expected_information_gain: Medium-high: can reject an appealing diagnostic model without causal ground truth.
conjectures.observation_route: Replay immutable incident traces with predeclared telemetry masks; any Evidence requires a preregistered Claim and frozen gate.

conjectures.title: Closure pressure may collapse the hypothesis portfolio
conjectures.source_mechanism: Optimization for visible impact can concentrate attention while curiosity policies allocate exploration against unresolved uncertainty.
conjectures.target_mechanism: An autonomous research loop optimizing closure alone may repeatedly select near-term tractable conjectures and narrow its source and hypothesis distribution.
analogy_map: field breadth → source-domain and mechanism diversity
disanalogies: Scientific careers have social incentives absent from a single research loop
Synaplex can explicitly measure and constrain its portfolio
competing_explanations: Lower diversity is temporary specialization with higher later transfer
falsifiers: Source-domain and mechanism diversity stays stable or rises under increased closure pressure after controlling for available sources
conjectures.expected_information_gain: High: separates productive focus from self-reinforcing epistemic collapse.
conjectures.observation_route: Retrospective shadow scoring of registered candidates under alternative attention policies; any Evidence requires a preregistered Claim and frozen gate.

conjectures.title: Research-loop capability must be measured by stage, not prose quality
conjectures.source_mechanism: Operational scientific agents can answer domain questions while failing at physical action, correction, or stage transitions; feedback analysis distinguishes local correction from whole-system capability.
conjectures.target_mechanism: A strong synthesis may conceal failures in retrieval, registration, execution, interpretation, or publication.
analogy_map: physical action failure → typed transition failure
feedback limits → bounded reflection and repair
disanalogies: Software stages are more replayable than physical experiments
Physical instruments introduce noise absent from deterministic validators
competing_explanations: Stage failures are interface defects rather than capability defects
End-to-end success is dominated by one bottleneck
falsifiers: Stage-specific scores add no predictive value over synthesis quality for end-to-end completion
conjectures.expected_information_gain: High: locates whether fluent interpretation is masking broken transitions.
conjectures.observation_route: Score archived internal cycles stage by stage without changing outcomes; any Evidence requires a preregistered Claim and frozen gate.

conjectures.title: Expert interventions should enter as typed graph constraints
conjectures.source_mechanism: Expert-in-loop discovery makes domain constraints explicit; secure development frameworks require traceable decisions and provenance.
conjectures.target_mechanism: Principal corrections may be more reliable when represented as scoped, reviewable constraints instead of unstructured prompt residue.
analogy_map: expert edge constraint → principal scope constraint
causal graph revision → Programme mechanism revision
disanalogies: Principal authority is governance, not causal expertise
Some corrections concern values rather than graph structure
competing_explanations: Structured constraints add bureaucracy without reducing recurrence
Prompt-level examples are sufficient for durable behavior
falsifiers: Typed constraints do not reduce repeated requirement-invention or boundary-collapse regressions
conjectures.expected_information_gain: High: tests whether governance corrections become durable machine-checkable state.
conjectures.observation_route: Shadow-classify historical corrections into typed constraints and compare recurrence detection; any Evidence requires a preregistered Claim and frozen gate.
